data.name: SymbolIsNotAValue
data.value: Symbol "{0}" is not an expression value

data.name: MustBeAssignmentReference
data.value: Expected symbol or pointer access expression

data.name: ValueMustBeAddressable
data.value: Value must be an addressable value

data.name: MultipleSameModifiers
data.value: A declaration cannot have multiple modifiers of the same type

data.name: ExternalFunctionCannotHaveABody
data.value: A function marked as external cannot have a body

data.name: LoopControlInstructionMustBeInLoop
data.value: A loop control instruction must be inside a loop

data.name: InvalidTypeKind
data.value: Cannot have this kind of type here

data.name: ThisStatementMustBePlacedAtFileScope
data.value: This statement must be placed at file scope

data.name: ThisStatementMustBePlacedAtFunctionScope
data.value: This statement must be placed at function scope

data.name: SymbolAlreadyDeclaredAsType
data.value: Symbol "{0}" has already been declared as a type
